notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, third baseman Javier Sanoja to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Richie Palacios out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Walls plunked
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Walls hit by pitch. Ryan Vilade to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Joe Mack reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Taylor Walls. Esteury Ruiz scores. Jakob Marsee scores. Fielding error by catcher Hunter Feduccia.
